differential_diagnoses: Disseminated Bartonella henselae infection (Cat Scratch Disease)
Chronic Granulomatous Disease with systemic infection
Chronic Nonbacterial Osteomyelitis (CNO/CRMO) with incidental findings
Systemic granulomatous disease (e.g., Sarcoidosis or Histoplasmosis)
next_steps: Bartonella henselae serology and PCR (blood and/or biopsy)
Assessment of neutrophil oxidative burst (DHR flow cytometry) to screen for CGD
Biopsy of a liver or bone lesion for histopathology, culture (bacterial, fungal, mycobacterial), and molecular testing
Complete blood count with differential, ESR, and CRP
Interferon-gamma release assay (IGRA) or PPD for tuberculosis
